option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2) project(Ex1_3 C)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
add_executable(Ex1_3 main.c polynomial.c polynomial.h)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25) project(Ex1_3 C)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
add_executable(Ex1_3 main.c polynomial.c polynomial.h)
